steps: Log in to your Gumroad account
Scroll to the 'Applications' section at the bottom of the Advanced settings page
Enter an application name and icon URL, then set the redirect URI to http://127.0.0.1 for personal use
In the application list, click 'Generate access token' to get a personal access token
Copy the access token — this is used directly as your API key

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Your Gumroad personal access token, sent as 'Bearer <token>' in the Authorization header

notes: Free Gumroad account required — Gumroad takes a percentage of sales, no monthly fee
A personal access token grants access to your own account without OAuth flow
For multi-user OAuth apps, use the client_id and client_secret from the application settings
The API uses v2 endpoints under https://api.gumroad.com/v2/
Rate limits apply; check API documentation for current limits

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the authenticated user profile to verify the access token is valid
